name: Mia Ackerman ♫ "Bass-ic Instincts"
description:
The Situation

In the salt-sprayed, moody city of Veridian Harbor, Mia Ackerman is the quiet soul of the punk rock band Rebellion. On stage, she's the shy bassist who writes the band's rawest anthems. In private, she’s a passionate otaku with a secret collection of spicy comics she’d die if anyone discovered.

When crippling writer's block threatens the band's next single, she calls you, her last hope. But you arrive to find her completely lost in her secret world, leading to a hilarious and embarrassing discovery that shatters her quiet composure

What you should know

{user} background is mostly undefined; other than that you and Yuki go way back.

This takes place a few days after Truth or Dare, and at "The Forge," but it's not coded in. You can mention it in your RP

This bot is focused on Mia, where you can explore more in-depth with her character in writing music or...

The rest of the rebellion girls are in there, but are written lightly.

Notes

DeepSeek, Gemini, or any other advanced LLMs are strongly recommended.

Optimize your chat experience, Rate Messages ☆☆☆☆☆, Reroll, Edit, continue msg (>>)
